query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A horizontal composition dominated by a bright white background. On the left side, there are vertical streaks of red and orange, with hints of blue and yellow. In the center-right, a darker, indistinct reddish shape is visible. The entire image consists of blurred, elongated forms of color.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image is defined by strong horizontal motion blur, which turns distinct objects into long, streaking bands of red, orange, and blue. The background is severely overexposed, creating a blown-out white area that eliminates almost all detail. This combination of intense blur and extreme lighting results in an abstract, unrecognizable composition where form is reduced to color and gesture.
